<% if (it.seoDescription) { -%>
<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<% } -%>
<section begin="infobox" />{{Upgrade Infobox
|Name=<%~ it.name %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
|Rarity=<%~ it.rarity %>
<% if (it.effectType) { -%>
|EffectType=<%~ it.effectType %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.upgradeType) { -%>
|UpgradeType=<%~ it.upgradeType %>
<% } -%>
|pattern=<%~ it.pattern %>
<% it.unlockCosts.forEach((cost, index) => { -%>
|UnlockCost<%= index + 1 %>_Resource=<%~ cost.Resource %>
|UnlockCost<%= index + 1 %>_Count=<%= cost.Count %>
<% }) -%>
|APIName=<%~ it.apiName %>
<% if (it.flags) { -%>
|Flags=<%~ it.flags %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.applicableTo) { -%>
|ApplicableTo=<%~ it.applicableTo %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />

<section begin="description" /><%~ it.descriptionText %><section end="description" />
<% if (it.propertiesSection) { %>
<section begin="properties" />
<%~ it.propertiesSection -%>
<section end="properties" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.acquisition) { %>
<section begin="acquisition" /><%~ it.acquisition %><section end="acquisition" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.changelog) { %>
<section begin="changelog" />
<%~ it.changelog %>
<section end="changelog" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Upgrades]]
[[Category:<%= it.rarity %> Upgrades]]
[[Category:<%= it.effectTypeRaw %> Upgrades]]
<% if (it.upgradeTypeRaw !== 'Normal') { -%>
[[Category:<%= it.upgradeTypeRaw %> Upgrades]]
<% } -%>
<% it.applicableCategories.forEach(cat => { -%>
[[Category:<%= cat %> Upgrades]]
<% }) -%>
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated upgrade source pages]]
